title: Your Next Store — Commerce with Next.js and Stripe
description: Your Next Store is a modern, ultra-fast commerce storefront with Stripe as the backend, using shadcn UI components.
usefulLines: Your Next Store — Commerce with Next.js and Stripe
Your Next Store is a modern, ultra-fast commerce storefront with Stripe as the backend, using shadcn UI components.
Direct Stripe API integration — checkout, billing, subscriptions
summary: Your Next Store — Commerce with Next.js and Stripe is a Ecommerce reference with verified Next.js codebase, App Router structure, dashboard shell patterns. Site form: storefront. Verdict: valid.

# URL of the YNS instance
YNS_API_KEY=your_api_token_here
NEXT_PUBLIC_YNS_API_TENANT=optional_api_base_url

styleRules: Keep the strongest layout rhythm from the reference, but adapt it to the chosen runtime scaffold.
Prefer polished, production-looking App Router structure over screenshot-faithful clones.
Preserve clear information density with persistent navigation and scannable panels.
Use clear value hierarchy, product proof, and pricing rhythm before deep detail.
avoidPatterns: Do not paste large reference code blocks verbatim into the generated site.
Do not let reference aesthetics override the user's actual topic, language, or route plan.
Avoid turning dashboard references into generic marketing landing pages.
Avoid weak CTA hierarchy or pricing without surrounding trust signals.
worldClassRubric: Professional hierarchy above the fold: strong headline, CTA clarity, and balanced spacing.
Reusable sections with believable content, not generic lorem-style filler.
Accessible semantics and responsive layout decisions that survive a real Next.js preview.
Dense UI must still feel legible, fast, and trustworthy.
Commercial sections should feel conversion-ready without looking template-generic.
